label: Set up worktree
args: set -e; main="$ZED_MAIN_GIT_WORKTREE"; cd "$ZED_WORKTREE_ROOT"; if [ -f "$main/.env.local" ] && [ ! -f .env.local ]; then cp "$main/.env.local" .env.local; fi; if [ -f "$main/db/dev.db" ] && [ ! -f db/dev.db ]; then mkdir -p db && cp "$main/db/dev.db" db/dev.db; fi; if [ -d "$main/data/paperforge" ] && [ ! -d data/paperforge ]; then mkdir -p data && cp -r "$main/data/paperforge" data/paperforge; fi; if [ -d "$main/public/paperforge" ] && [ ! -e public/paperforge ]; then mkdir -p public && ln -sfn "$main/public/paperforge" public/paperforge; fi; make setup
